SEARCH
Package io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor

Class TypeSupport

java.lang.Object
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.TypeSupport
public final class TypeSupport extends Object
Single source of truth for built-in and platform parameter types.

Replaces the four scattered if (name.equals("int") || name.equals("java.lang.Integer")) chains that previously lived in BaseCommandProcessor and the platform processors. Each registered type carries all its compile-time behaviors (literal rendering, parsing codegen, Brigadier argument/retrieval expressions, suggestion codegen) so a beginner reads one table instead of hunting through four methods.

The base instance (builtins()) covers String, the eight primitives, and their wrappers. Platform processors call register(Entry) for platform types (e.g. org.bukkit.entity.Player).

  • Constructor Details

    • TypeSupport

      public TypeSupport()

  • Method Details

    • builtins

      public static TypeSupport builtins()
      Returns:
      the shared, immutable registry of JDK built-in types.

    • register

      public void register(TypeSupport.Entry e)
      Register a platform-specific type entry (e.g. Player, World, Location).

    • get

      public TypeSupport.Entry get(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type)
      Returns:
      the entry for the given type, or null if not registered.

    • isBuiltIn

      public boolean isBuiltIn(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type)
      Returns:
      true if the type is registered (built-in or platform).

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type)
      Returns:
      the argument width, defaulting to 1 for unregistered types.

    • primitiveDefault

      public String primitiveDefault(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type)
      Returns:
      the primitive default literal ("0", "0.0", "false", "'\\0'", or "null").

    • literal

      public com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock literal(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type, String defaultValue)
      Returns:
      the literal CodeBlock for a default value, or null for unregistered types.

    • emitParse

      public void emitParse(com.palantir.javapoet.MethodSpec.Builder spec, com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type, String var, String arg)
      Emit parse statements (e.g. var = Integer.parseInt(arg)) into the given builder.

    • brigadierArgType

      public com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock brigadierArgType(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type, boolean greedy)
      Returns:
      the Brigadier argument-type expression (e.g. IntegerArgumentType.integer()).

    • brigadierRetrieval

      public com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock brigadierRetrieval(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type, String argName)
      Returns:
      the Brigadier retrieval expression (e.g. IntegerArgumentType.getInteger(ctx, argName)).

    • suggestReturn

      public com.palantir.javapoet.CodeBlock suggestReturn(com.palantir.javapoet.TypeName type, String argsVar, String currentVar)
      Returns:
      the suggest-method return CodeBlock, or null if no platform suggestion.
